sections.paragraph:
Original: רב־מג

Transliteration: rab-mâg

Phonetic: rab-mawg'

BDB Definition:

  1. soothsayer, magician, chief soothsayer
    1. Rab-mag, chief soothsayer, or chief of princes, an official of Babylonia

Origin: from H7227 and a foreign word for a Magian

TWOT entry: 1143

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
